claims.claim_text: バンズルはアウトソーシング型の分散消費財流通モデルにより、食品・医療・清掃衛生・安全器具・小売等6業種の顧客に対してワンストップのサプライチェーンサービスを提供し、個別製品メーカーや地域流通業者が複製困難な統合的サービス提供力を持つ
claims.evidence_from_transcript: Q4 2014 Prepared Remarks (CEO Mike Roney): 'We are well diversified by customer markets, selling into 6 different customer sectors. We are a resilient business, with our strong positions in grocery, foodservice, cleaning and hygiene and healthcare making up approximately 3/4 of our revenue.' / 2013: 'In North America, top 40 customers, just under 30 of the top 40 are North America.'
claims.speaker: CEO (Mike Roney) / CFO (Brian May)

claims.claim_text: バンズルの自社ブランド（Own Label）浸透率は2012年の16%→2014年の18%へ継続上昇しており、特に安全器具（Safety）セグメントではdouble-digit marginを実現する高利益率製品ラインを構築している
claims.evidence_from_transcript: Q4 2014 Q&A (CEO Mike Roney): 'The real big driver [of high margin in safety], it's own label, a lot of it's own label. It is a double-digit margin business for us.' / 2014 full year: 'Own label was 18% [of sales]. Year ago in 2013, it was 17%. Moving up about 1% per year. 20% is a near-term target.'
claims.speaker: CEO (Mike Roney)

claims.claim_text: バンズルのグローバル買収統合力（2013年に11件・2.05億ポンド、2014年に17件・2.11億ポンド）と、元オーナー経営者の高エンゲージメント維持により、他の産業統合者が模倣困難な系統的M&Aエンジンを持つ
claims.evidence_from_transcript: Q4 2014 Prepared Remarks (Chairman): 'Acquisitions activity remained strong throughout the year, and we acquired 17 businesses with a committed spend of GBP 211 million.' / Q4 2014 Q&A (CEO): 'All of these ex-owners, some which sold their businesses for very high prices and could stop doing work today are still very engaged, very passionate and really want to drive the business forward under the Bunzl umbrella.'
claims.speaker: CEO (Mike Roney) / Chairman (Philip Rogerson)

claims.claim_text: バンズルは大陸ヨーロッパで9%、英国で7.4%という業界水準を上回る営業利益率を維持し、グループ全体での7%安定マージンを実現する効率的なコスト管理（ブランチ統合・労働効率化）と調達力を持つ
claims.evidence_from_transcript: Q4 2014 CFO (Brian May): 'Group operating margin at 7% was 20 basis points higher than the prior year.' / Q4 2014 Q&A CEO: 'Continental Europe, today, we're at 9%, which is a very high operating margin, really in a no-growth or very low-growth environment.' / 'The U.K., with some growth, will get back to the 7% or more. We've had GDP growth in the last year or 2, and now we're back up to 7.4%.'
claims.speaker: CEO / CFO

claims.claim_text: バンズルの業界統合戦略では、500件以上の潜在的M&A対象を保有し、特に安全器具セグメントで6年以内にブラジル・チリで最大市場プレイヤーに成長した実績が、新市場参入の再現可能なプレイブックを持つことを示している
claims.evidence_from_transcript: Q4 2014 Q&A CEO: 'Just over 6 years, we've built the -- we're the biggest, the strongest, the best market position currently today in both Brazil and Chile [in safety].' / 'Once you write that first check, the word gets around, and all of a sudden, the phone starts to ring. So I...and also, in these emerging markets...there are a lot of companies we just can't identify or just don't know what they really have.'
claims.speaker: CEO (Mike Roney)

claims.claim_text: バンズルはITシステム統合（地域別単一プラットフォーム）と在庫管理効率化（オーナー経営者比較でより少ない在庫を価値とする文化）により、買収後の運転資本削減と利益率向上を系統的に実現するプロセスを持つ
claims.evidence_from_transcript: Q4 2014 CFO: 'One of the biggest synergies we get from our acquisitions is the ability to skinny down the working capital within the business to a more efficient level. The owner managers of the businesses often value their wealth by how much inventory is in their warehouse. We value our wealth by how little inventory is in the warehouse.' / 'the underlying average working capital...we're actually GBP 10 million lower on average in 2014 versus 2013.'
claims.speaker: CFO (Brian May)

claims.claim_text: バンズルのセーフティ事業部では、グローバル会議を通じてクロスボーダーのプロダクトラインチとブランド共有（スペインのグローブブランドをUKに展開等）が行われており、グローバルで統一されたプライベートブランド製品のスケールメリットを享受している
claims.evidence_from_transcript: Q4 2014 Q&A CEO: 'They have been having 2 meetings a year, which, effectively, all the countries are getting together. They're talking about launching some global brands in new product categories. Companies have a strong brand in their country, and now other countries, which isn't selling that product, wants to launch it under that brand. Good example was Spain. Our business here in the U.K., because they're bringing some of the products, their Spanish business sells into the U.K. under their brand.'
claims.speaker: CEO (Mike Roney)

claims.claim_text: バンズルは2006年の北米・欧州中心のポートフォリオからRest of Worldのオペレーティングプロフィット貢献を4%から12%へ増加させており、地理的分散による成長エンジンの持続性を確保している
claims.evidence_from_transcript: Q4 2014 Prepared Remarks (CEO Mike Roney): 'I would like to note the continued strong growth in the Rest of the World business area as its share of group operating profit has moved from 4% in 2006 to the current level of 12%, and I would expect that number to increase further in the coming years.'
claims.speaker: CEO (Mike Roney)
